flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Jarvis Christian University are 39% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($33.0k vs $53.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Jarvis Christian University fell 99% between 2021 and 2024 (27.2% → 0.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Jarvis Christian University fell 59% between 2021 and 2024 (36.6% → 15.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Jarvis Christian University fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (717 → 577).
